sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100294" key="sunepipa/sxw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεπι-πάσχω</orth>, <sense id="n100294.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feel emotion together</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μετὰ πάθους τινός</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1037b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
